title: About PIL
content: Prompt Instruction Language (PIL) is a domain-specific language designed for programming Large Language Models (LLMs). It aims to provide a robust, scalable, and maintainable framework.

title: RAG in LLMs
content: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) is a technique to improve LLM performance by retrieving relevant documents from an external knowledge base and providing them as context to the LLM.

title: PIL Core Features
content: PIL's core features include a declarative YAML syntax, support for embedded Python (code steps), first-class RAG and agent patterns, and structured output definitions.

title: Jinja2 Templating
content: PIL uses Jinja2 for its templating engine, allowing dynamic substitution of variables within prompt text and other fields using {{ variable_name }} syntax.

title: Future of PIL
content: Future plans for PIL include a compiler for self-optimization, advanced IDE support via LSP, and enhanced security features against prompt injection.
